title: Badge
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Badge wrapper using pure class maps and cn.

examples.title: BadgeIcon
examples.description: Inline start and end icon Badge examples.

examples.title: BadgeRtl
examples.description: RTL Badge layout example with local Arabic strings.

examples.title: BadgeSpinner
examples.description: Badge examples using an example-local spinner helper.

deviations.summary: Icon examples use local inline SVGs instead of origin icon packages.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve the inline icon DOM role and visual footprint for Badge examples without adding icon registry items.

deviations.summary: Spinner example uses a local inline SVG instead of an installable shadcn Spinner component.
deviations.rationale: This batch intentionally does not add shadcn/spinner as an installable registry item. The example-local SVG preserves the origin spinner slot, status role, and icon placement.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic example constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
